title: COVID-19 vaccines vs. new SARS-CoV-2 strains
author: Domina Petric
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: SARS-CoV-2 is an enveloped virus with a single-stranded positive sense RNA genome. Vaccine efficacy can be limited by mutations in RNA viruses. Most mutations in the SARS-CoV-2 genome have no impact on viral function, but certain variants have garnered widespread attention because of their rapid emergence within populations and potential for transmission or clinical implications.
steps_raw: SARS-CoV-2 is an enveloped virus with a single-stranded positive sense RNA genome. Vaccine efficacy can be limited by mutations in RNA viruses.
